intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The visual data indicates a critical failure in the biome. The registry lists P1, P2, P3, and P4, but the physical evidence shows only two visible containers (one yellow, one black) and a white rabbit anchor. There is no evidence of the specified plant species (String of Nickels, Mexican Mint, Pothos, Silver Guest) in any of the pots.
vision_report.inventory_reconciliation: Systemic Loss: All registered specimens (P1-P4) are absent or have suffered total senescence. The containers are present but appear to contain only substrate and debris.

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty/Substrate only. No biological activity detected.
plant_audit.P2_Black_Pot: Empty/Substrate only. No biological activity detected.
plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: Contains white rabbit anchor. No Pothos foliage visible.
plant_audit.P4_Shared_Black_Pot: No distinct plant structure identified; appears to be part of the same empty substrate mass as P2.

vision_report.biome_observations: The soil surface in all pots appears dark and potentially oversaturated or devoid of organic life. No fungal blooms or incidental growth (weeds/seedlings) are present. The desk surface is clear of debris, suggesting a sterile or neglected environment.
vision_report.temporal_deltas: From EARLIEST to CURRENT, there is zero positive growth. The pots remain consistently empty, indicating that the 'Systemic Loss' occurred prior to the start of this observation sequence.
vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of total collapse. The lack of chlorophyll-bearing tissue confirms that the specimens are either dead, removed, or failed to germinate/establish.
vision_report.anomalies: The presence of a white rabbit anchor in an otherwise empty pot (P3) is the only non-substrate feature. No new introductions or interventions detected.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a completely dormant or failed botanical setup. Despite the registry's expectations, the pots are devoid of the listed species. The environment is static, with no signs of life, growth, or recent maintenance. The 'white rabbit' remains the only constant in an otherwise barren biome.
